en: No, no, no, the, um, the love part?

ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 안 돼.

ja: ダメダメダメダメダメダメ
vi: Khong khong khong khong khong khong

en: That's good, just keep rubbing your head. That'll turn back time.

en: This is unbelievable. I mean, this is unbelievable.

en: Nuh-uh. I don't think any of our lives are ever gonna be the same ever again.
